title: Cuneiform Tablet #0421: Old Babylonian Letter
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a letter document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a letter document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Letter document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records letter matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
